name: loophony
description: Codex App control plane and setup workflows for a local Loophony daemon.

interface.shortDescription: Set up, monitor, and steer a local Loophony daemon.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex App as the operator console for Loophony, create durable Linear project goals, inspect daemon state, submit operator input, and resolve scheduled human review gates.
defaultPrompt: Create the main Loophony goal in my Linear project.
Show the current Loophony daemon report.
Help me resolve the open Loophony goal review.
